title: reseda muricata var. muricata
intro: Reseda muricata var. muricata, also known as the prickly reseda or prickly mignonette, is a plant species in the borage family that is characterized by its distinctive, pungent odor and prickly stems. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Reseda muricata var. muricata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
